description: Explicit UI contract for the Verifier portal /reports route.

header.title: Reports
header.subtitle: Public-facing reports issued by the verifier collegium.

no_rows.body_text: No reports yet. Draft the first.

non_negotiables: Header has only ONE primary action: 'Draft report' with plus icon.
Page uses a 2-column card grid (p-grid p-grid-2).

Each card has exactly: head (name + '${kind} · issued ${issued}' sub on left, audit icon on right) and an action row (View secondary sm + Download PDF ghost sm + optional signed p-tag pushed right with marginLeft: auto).
Action buttons are size='sm' — do NOT eyeball-shrink.
Card sub composes '${kind} · issued ${issued}' (Unicode middle dot U+00B7).
Em dashes in titles (e.g. 'mcp/health-records — special review') MUST be preserved as Unicode U+2014.
Audit icon is decorative; production must mark aria-hidden="true".
Signed p-tag colour is #10b981 (green) and pushed to the right via marginLeft: 'auto'.
Signed p-tag renders ONLY when row.signed === true; in v0.4 mock data all rows are signed so the tag always shows.
Signed reports are IMMUTABLE — no Edit / Re-sign affordances under any role.
